evals.prompt: How should I implement persistence in iOS?
evals.expected_output: Choose storage tier: SwiftData for iOS 17+, Core Data for legacy, Keychain for secrets, UserDefaults for flags only. Use @Model macro for SwiftData models.

evals.prompt: How do I configure the data container in iOS?
evals.expected_output: Use @MainActor for ModelContainer (SwiftData) or NSPersistentContainer (Core Data). Perform background writes with newBackgroundContext() to avoid UI lag.

evals.prompt: What are the anti-patterns in iOS persistence?
evals.expected_output: No heavy I/O on viewContext — use private background contexts. No string-based predicates — use KeyPaths. Always set mergePolicy explicitly.

should_not_trigger: Set up a basic iOS project from scratch
How do I install iOS dependencies?
Configure CI/CD for an unrelated platform
